changelog:
VIUMO v1.1.1 • The Milestone Release! 🎉

This official update introduces a modernized, next-level streaming experience.

What's New:
• Next-Gen Video Player: Redesigned for maximum stability, smoother playback, and a premium look.
• Auto-Subtitles: Subtitles now download automatically alongside your movies.
• Seamless Series Binging: Watch the next episode instantly without ever leaving the player.

⚠️ Note: Updating from v1.0.7 or earlier will clear older downloaded videos due to system upgrades.
